title: echinospermum zeylanicum
intro: Echinospermum zeylanicum, also known as the Ceylon prickly ash, is a plant native to Sri Lanka, characterized by its unique, prickly stems and small, yellow flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. Echinospermum zeylanicum has been traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and is also believed to have anti-cancer properties. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in Ayurvedic and traditional medicine practices.
